meta.title: PSEiCARe — 1-year post-stroke epilepsy risk
meta.authors: Chi NF, Kuan YC, Huang YH, et al.
meta.outcome: 1-year risk group for late post-stroke epilepsy after ischaemic stroke, from 7 clinical factors (PSEiCARe score)
meta.cff_info:
What this shows. The PSEiCARe score (Chi et al., Clin Epidemiol 2018) stratifies the 1-year risk of late post-stroke epilepsy after ischaemic stroke into four groups. Developed on 87,068 and validated on 38,689 patients (Harrell's C 0.76–0.79).

How to read it

  • Sum the 7 factors (0–16). Groups: Low = 0 (~0.6%/yr), Medium = 1–5 (~2.6%/yr), High = 6–10 (~10%/yr), Very high = ≥11 (~28%/yr).
  • An early seizure at stroke admission alone scores 6 points → High group.

Note: the values are group-level 1-year incidence rates (per 100 person-years), not individual probabilities. Demonstration tool.

predictors.name: Seizure at stroke admission (early seizure)
predictors.assess: A seizure within 7 days of the stroke. Strongest factor = 6 points (HR 5.8).

predictors.name: ICU stay
predictors.assess: Any intensive-care-unit stay (a stroke-severity proxy). 3 points.

predictors.name: Prolonged hospital stay (>2 weeks)
predictors.assess: Length of stay over 2 weeks (stroke-severity proxy). 1 point.

predictors.name: Pneumonia on admission
predictors.assess: Respiratory-tract infection / pneumonia at stroke admission. 1 point.

model.note: Values are group-level 1-year incidence rates (per 100 person-years), NOT individual probabilities. Groups: Low 0 · Medium 1–5 · High 6–10 · Very high ≥11 (development-cohort rates 0.64 / 2.62 / 10.3 / 28.2%).

provenance.source: Chi 2018 Clin Epidemiol Table 2 (Schneeweiss points) + Table 3 (risk-group incidence) — doi 10.2147/CLEP.S168169, PMID 30174459
provenance.notes: PSEiCARe Schneeweiss 0-16. Points: early-seizure 6, ICU 3, dementia 2, AF 2, LOS>2wk 1, age≥80 1, pneumonia 1. Banded 1-yr incidence (dev): 0=0.64, 1-5=2.62, 6-10=10.3, ≥11=28.2 per 100py. No baseline hazard → group incidence, not individual probability. Harrell C 0.762/0.792. Built 2026-07-08.
